top_signals.title: Japan spent $74 billion propping up the yen. Investors say the real battle is with the Fed
top_signals.summary: Yen intervention alone is unlikely to reverse losses while wide U.S.-Japan rate differentials keep supporting the dollar, said analysts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Corruption cases, investibility warnings, fiscal woes: Indonesia continues to test investors
top_signals.summary: This comes amid a high-profile corruption sentencing and an MSCI warning Indonesia could be downgraded to frontier-market status.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Employers who laid off workers citing AI are already starting to regret it
top_signals.summary: Companies are realizing artificial intelligence can't do everything after all, prompting them to rehire employees to grow their businesses
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary
top_signals.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran says it won't meet with U.S. envoys, clouding prospects for peace deal - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Iran says it won't meet with U.S. envoys, clouding prospects for peace deal  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
